details.test: Task 1: Save three remote marketing jobs in New York and verify Saved Jobs
Task 2: Apply to a job via search results and job detail page
Task 3: Create candidate account and complete candidate profile
Task 4: Select mid-tier employer plan with background checks and book consultation
Task 5: Post full-time on-site Customer Support Specialist job in Austin
Task 6: Create shortlist of Seattle Software Developer candidates
Task 7: Schedule three interviews for Front-End Developer applicants
Task 8: Create two job alerts with different criteria and frequencies
Task 9: Generate Product Manager salary comparison and save report to dashboard
